page: UpCloud GPU-20xCPU-256GB-2xL40S is a GPU-accelerated server configured with 20 vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM. The system is powered by an AMD EPYC 9575F processor based on the x86_64 architecture, featuring 20 physical cores running at 2.0 GHz with shared CPU allocation. Graphics and parallel computing workloads are accelerated by two NVIDIA L40S GPUs from the Ada Lovelace family, delivering a combined 96 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage, requiring external storage solutions, and comes with one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Performance benchmarks indicate top-tier single-core execution, with stress-ng single-core, Geekbench single-core, and text processing scores all placing in the top 10%. Multi-core operations, including Geekbench multi-core and software compilation, rank in the top 25%. Memory performance is robust, with read-only and write bandwidth tests consistently placing in the top 25%. For artificial intelligence workloads, LLM inference prompt processing and text generation for small 135M models reach top-tier speeds, while text generation for medium 7B models remains strong, though prompt processing for 7B models falls into the middle 50%.

From a resource density perspective, the server offers high cost efficiency for GPU-heavy and memory-intensive tasks by pairing a substantial 256.0 GB memory footprint with dual enterprise-grade GPUs. The lack of local storage represents a key architectural tradeoff, meaning users must factor in network storage performance. This configuration is highly suited for machine learning inference, data science pipelines, parallel processing, and memory-intensive database operations.
description: UpCloud GPU-20xCPU-256GB-2xL40S is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 20 vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 9575F x86_64 processor. The hardware configuration includes two NVIDIA L40S Ada Lovelace GPUs providing 96 GB of total VRAM, with no local storage bundled. Benchmark results show top-tier single-core CPU performance and strong multi-core capabilities, alongside high memory bandwidth. LLM inference speeds are exceptionally high for small models and remain strong for medium-sized models. This server offers high resource density for parallel computing and memory-intensive tasks, making it highly suitable for machine learning inference, data science, and complex database operations.
og_description: UpCloud GPU-20xCPU-256GB-2xL40S is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 20 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and dual NVIDIA L40S GPUs with 96 GB VRAM, designed for machine learning and data science.
meta_description: UpCloud GPU-20xCPU-256GB-2xL40S features 20 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and dual NVIDIA L40S GPUs with 96 GB VRAM for GPU-accelerated workloads.
tagline: A high-density GPU server featuring dual accelerators and substantial memory for parallel computing and machine learning inference workloads.
bullet_points: Dual NVIDIA L40S GPUs with 96 GB total VRAM
20 AMD EPYC 9575F vCPUs with top-tier single-core performance
256.0 GB of system memory for large-scale datasets
No bundled local storage, requiring external storage attachment
Optimized for machine learning inference and data science pipelines
